entries.name: Delete Elements from 1D Array (Boolean)__ogtk
entries.python_inline: _indices_set = set({indices}); {array_w_subset_deleted} = [x for i, x in enumerate({array}) if i not in _indices_set]; {deleted_elements} = [{array}[i] for i in sorted({indices}) if i < len({array})]
